# Compiler Explorer (Godbolt) Links

Interactive assembly listings for the three `lb_propagate_step` kernel
variants, each with multiple compiler flag configurations (GCC 13.3,
x86-64).

## AoS (interleaved `double complex`)

Four columns: scalar, -O3, -O3 -march=x86-64-v3, -O3 -march=x86-64-v3 -ffast-math

https://godbolt.org/#z/OYLghAFBqd5QCxAYwPYBMCmBRdBLAF1QCcAaPECAMzwBtMA7AQwFtMQByARg9KtQYEAysib0QXACx8BBAKoBnTAAUAHpwAMvAFYTStJg1AB9U8lJL6yAngGVG6AMKpaAVxYM9DgDJ4GmADl3ACNMYgkAdlIAB1QFQlsGZzcPPVj4mwFffyCWUPCuKMtMa0ShAiZiAmT3Ty4LTCtMhnLKgmzAkLDIiwqqmtT6hT72v0687sKASgtUV2Jkdg4AUgAmAGY/ZDcsAGpl9cdh9CwqADoEA%2BxljQBBNc2Gbdc9g8c0Fmj6VQurm/u7gA3VB4dC7WjBYzRYioaJMYBMAiYYzDTDRYxMOIQeIAL2RBF26FWpH%2BuzJ5IplKpVLQDGGhLmwXouw%2BX0wql2ACpiJhhsQ8NZdsoSXdqWLxeTafT0IzmazvlyeXyBQTASVjH4RbcJTqqTLXEzMCzUJ8FdzeQR%2BYK1chjHMCFN/ssIgAhUnk/jEXbYvB44wEvD7dYAEV2GgOLt2gbehNWEajazdqxdU32rvdetlRvl7N2TGQyCDoY0Z3D6zdoupnu9uPxu20RbD8YbMaJzcTidTzor2p1%2BcLHZDQuWAFYXYHObH9sn66PQ5ObRqGKOXdo5xGM5TncHNxTF/aV3g543%2BxvK2Tt06Iju7hwZrROCPeJ4OFpSKhOI5dgo5gsjQ8eFIAhNDvGYAGsJAATjOAAOdZVhHSQYMkDR1kgiIADZILg/ROEkZ8QPfTheAUEANCAkCZjgWAYEQFATWiOgwnIShWSY8JkGALh1nWPg6CRYhSIgYJCOCPxKgAT04QCxOYYgJIAeWCbQSmA7heA%2BNhBAUhhaCk19eCwYJXGARwxFoUj1NILAWEMYBxAM6y8B5Uo1Ust92RKVwkWk3g/CRB9HNoPBgmISTnCwQjLTwFhfNINViGCOJMGDTBbKMYKjEovgDGABQADU8EwAB3BTokYOL%%2B76loTqgqCYYZE8RBATrO0FeXga7GlUxJ7AYJwXFqLwa46XJ8jSOIEgEAY6hiNvmibroCgaJoyhGTu9GKUoBFaKo%2B4mAfhjaUehhGGeW6h2Zbrqh6OCfUg8ZOzg3o%2Br6fr%2BwtAeBiBQZWiGoZhyit8x7HccIgmLCJ2HQNICDJAw2D1kkLgXAYKrAwiAmC6F6iBXWE9fGxFiZw1INRKAZMKYMXYixWmaCqYoC4jxPiLMwhs1EuJeS3MSGKWUqpQWJotIi10vpRWmBjKmXMjLQyaV5bG0Ms5SuqtHLq01nFHWgU3z63ChgLhQF%2BRm0AhbZK1t5Z22ylQXKzsSplQqlZT2NUfbSD9koAOrUQC8Q6iYMw%2BhI5l3fDHRIo0FLQPfMXC6Vibp/nuujHee8iKvTTsfX6/1z4g3wNfAC0N4Gf0RsjboaNAqPxADjXeL84GkXIh/Um8Byb0U%2BOgmmdMOK4KZvxQhlB2Zvh5vpGS5C%2BZUKskLbS9DxZMMlqwuKcsMqSKVrw0u/DVBeR8lZYResQoGwkkbKK0i4pyKthwjKSiHYqKdoVdRbtKqyB0XVPRsh/YtTfLoaQpiw7mN6lHaxscODx0mknZAKdgy%2BIzoCBxp0wjnVLgNQelc7AQAcIvUgPgxjN0mN3DIiQfnpHbgwFegLx7NCntUOugx3kTxaMvf5/cx4j3hV3ee09UWz3ca4u6a9AqeKST4o%2B31/Fn3WEDIJYMvShLviTB%2BvAn6JOesk9%2B98v7GOpTxPl/KBXowcV41%2BaSt6rBgfvDgjK4YzASvEOwkggA%3D%3D

## SoA (split real/imag arrays)

Four columns: scalar, -O3, -O3 -march=x86-64-v3, -O3 -march=x86-64-v3 -ffast-math

https://godbolt.org/#z/OYLghAFBqd5QCxAYwPYBMCmBRdBLAF1QCcAaPECAMzwBtMA7AQwFtMQByARg9KtQYEAysib0QXACx8BBAKoBnTAAUAHpwAMvAFYTStJg1AB9U8lJL6yAngGVG6AMKpaAVxYMQAJlIOAMngMmABy7gBGmMTeAKykAA6oCoS2DM5uHt7xickCAUGhLBFRXrGWmNYpQgRMxARp7p4%%2B5uqp1Snbgsnd2lk5bRAOx4lZvYF0e7%%2B/hBBEMR2CkGRBEUFR1B23QfAMUHTGMcx7rCOLIBmX4bAlTh8O6rwdnwqgGFQfDeUwTB8MO6wSEjaVWfZ/DXAYH5aFofDaFQX4FF4VBvspLAqYgGZmjpzwIAcQZPC4XwGHQToCiKPQEiSTXdbN7JNeN7oon1jXKhGK3HcwKxNbaWo7YmB2%2BnaV3/e9sYTZ6Lh1bMxYJE07TIp2oyOB2VQ3MC/DAskHZgCrHYyrONZw1wQgSGPKypl4QatCmGYEEwJgsCiNWwo4CLSA%2B6IEr0gyE9i%2BLEum5K0ogJACuy%2BgyAoCAR6KlBSvKyraGq2r6p2jqWs%2B1eut6/rrE%2BkbGAIcbJqi2b5sWyWVus9bNu2gz8H2mxDpWgyTrOi7Vuu92oopp6upepYDPep9b6v0lAAyBltQIoB%2B7g3%2BNDWGCMkZ6WsqjYQohxBYxQbjNQUVdCxGJiYMw%2BgHqqxpnETWK1Gb53whtBYlwEzJ1TunXmVCqBUCYEcahgIEAKyVq8I61MLDuwGikewhtA7%2BBDvba2FsUiB3NjkBgPtTZuw9s7AOLgGh6Cdq0EYSiw5BzqBojIjtdGSN9tHWY8wo7hybjpUgncFacCTinNOGcs7IBzmsPOBd8BEDDJZcO5ckox2brwNuHcordwsL3Cu9lSBOUkIFdyaxJBcC4G5LwgVMluQCvrW6aw45dxin3SupAUpQEHsPTKo9coTynmPGeZUKo0AXpEJeDUmpdXXp0nqfUBq70yqNA%2BE0pq30wHNBaS0L4zUBtff%2BM09rCMfsdU6yBzpLGsh/W6Blv7PQwPMmylIPqrWAX9MB19IFgyoBDOB8NEbI1Wig9G6DpCYKUNggmIAKr4JAKTcmxD4CkPIQzbqBTDK8JVoCwRqi7DazEUYvWBsjZmOUVkGRAg5E2xSHov22iGBe0MekRFeKCU4q0S7BF5L2hkpsaZKxmMQl2IcdFRODDXGZ2zrnfOEBC5%2BJLoEkpcSa51x6I3W6Ldwn2MicUuKCVYkD3gEPDKhUx55UntU6eJUmnz0XpQZeBkN5TXaj0re/TVp7zGiM4%2B4zT5TM%2BlfYGBy75LKOjtF%2Bay36bMEJ/O6D0f7NT/m9I5QDIggP%2BrM4GlzoHXNgTDO5iCUayGeZjV5sgsH4wMroaQPy/lEMplC2mKQKGgpZjQ5AdD4xsqYY8MFitIjK34Y3PFoinCUv1hI/IUj9byMtm2tFCiaXQuETo9RRKtFCJaPi0xnbzEmNHZoudwcZ3KIjvSixt0mXStZS49OHKPFcp8UXfx6wBXypCRKkA7cpXxxlTE4J8SvlePKs%2Bl9r6m5guZVEs9TcvCFMcRwIJ/cZjfSSHYSQQA%3D%3D

## AVX2 intrinsics (interleaved layout, manual SIMD)

Two columns: -O3 -march=x86-64-v3, -O3 -march=x86-64-v3 -ffast-math
(scalar and plain -O3 fail because AVX2 intrinsics require -mavx2 or equivalent)

https://godbolt.org/#z/OYLghAFBqd5QCxAYwPYBMCmBRdBLAF1QCcAaPECAMzwBtMA7AQwFtMQByARg9KtQYEAysib0QXACx8BBAKoBnTAAUAHpwAMvAFYTStJg1AB9U8lJL6yAngGVG6AMKpaAVxYMQAJlIOAMngMmABy7gBGmMQgktIADqgKhLYMzm4e3qTxiTYCAUGhLBFRMRaYVjkMQgRMxASp7p4%2BlpjWyVU1BHkh4ZHR0grVtfXpTYOdgd2FvTEAlBaorsTI7BwApF4AzIHIblgA1KsbjgPoWFQAdAiH2KsaAILrWww7rvuHjngsLIEExIGX11uD3uADdUHh0HtaGFjLFiKhYkxgEwCJhjANMLFjEwQaovBBEgAvNEEPboHxAvZU6k02l0%2BloBgDMkLML0PYAKmImAGf2se2UpEp9JFoupjOZ6FZ7K5PN%2BeH5IJaxkCQvuYo19KlrjZmE53N5CtJSuQxgWBBmQNWAHYAELCqn8Yh7Al4YnGUl4A4bAAiew0h1tey97zJXkDwfW9q8tpmBztDtpphYXgArAA2SFMZDIb1%2B4xfNPp9GYAjE%2BGw9AQS0be33RM0okkvbaPP%2BwMN6lOl0R1tRvZcb2OMO9g4xw5%2Brxxm11u6a5NFyFYk1tgspjPGWioJjoVyViDrdPKVap20QL0csNjoPaOOX8Opn012fzguLvYg4wrid7NdFzfbru%2B6HiaKoMCetqtveJ5Ph29bqhqC4ZkuxjcquhYbiwqBKruWKxFWy4tM%2BnZ0khmZ7FinzoeuxYKAgrhUFQ9D7oR5gUV%2BLSkP6qgAGLEQhYpkZCn4KAA7kwsTUf%2BdEMUxaL4RAn4mlxSmcdxqb8cCc6IW%2ByEUfC6CDj%2Bf6Ya4tAsahmAqRxyCaa%2BNFLgZXhSaZ5kKZRLDWWJEmaSRtLZrmxkYcWO7oPuAVcSZIWnAoOosQZXBcXCGBTnZ9I2j6VoCbS2q6nsAXYsQxAQZIMFwdppHBeiRDcnuCkFTUZD5TmaV0rl7JENU5loT%2BDVFRBAaPtezWmo1EEPpltZ%2Be1eqdWIKosG2fXFaeXAwcNy0QRsZVTfBFW0t2B61i2Q4jsd2hRlG04JtlIozexPW%2BgKEHnpyV79reb0TeVmr3R5bbHqer2XuSw2ffew1rY%2BP0avdn6PX6oGBBBUF7N9u37Xd0p6p%2BVE/kj4Gnqjzn9lDk0vhqc3dXql1PRAWJoZe8OYHGAC0Lr/UzC2taKVMLdeP709yMN0srrgEKrX2QxrT1858Ovxpl9bWj6HBzLQnCprwngcFopCoJww4KAsSw05sPCkAQmh23MADW3ipuckgABySBoGwAJzWumSepnH6Y%2BA7HCSM7wfu5wvAKCAGiB8HcxwLASBoCwsR0JE5CUNXtf0FEyDAFwGwbHwdCosQRcQGEedhIENQAJ6cAHw/MMQo8APJhNoLRB9wvDV2wgizwwtDj67vBYGErjAI4Yi0EXK%2BkFgLCGMA4i7xfeDcq0Spn27mCqC0%2BsrAHPxlHntB4GEYgY9nBYDzvKFgE9eBKmIGEBImAfSYCvkYf%%2BBH42GfnnN%2BH9UTEJ/lnN2bCgEzxASsN24DiHQNgUoBBSCb6BFAJs9BSJsG4PwYQl2Ad%2BCkNEOIShtLqEqHUHfXQ0hGEmDMPoABOiuGxB4ZwPh8jhHIFET6HJUiZFyPUdArRPJ4AJICZ4zwEAHCRMSuY/IoTrEJFsSkXxDjMh6ucRYnV/j9FeIiYaqJyqKjePGNquJUTrVpCNdE2osSrE1PmEkihqSOBOyWXnTJ2SJFSvyYUjuJSXTlJqlUmpdSy5hxAJ3EpncM2ZszfocZvAIFcA0CXZZ6iC4WHWfUkOOaOBeHSSs0tFbGmkGgYkOwkggA%3D%3D%3D
